title: Bottle Of Enchanting Recipe
description: This mod adds two different recipes to craft a bottle o' enchanting
body:
**Bottle Of Enchanting Recipe**
===========================================
This mod adds 2 recipes to craft bottles of enchanting.

Version 1.0.0 Recipes:
Crafting Recipe 1#:
- 8 Gold nuggets
- 1 Bottle
Crafts 8 Bottles o' Enchanting

![Crafting Recipe 1#](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dde1bccb45130fc1598f497dee8a38d26a0f6c32.png)

Crafting Recipe 2#:
- 4 Emeralds
- 4 Gold nuggets
- 1 Bottle
Crafts 32 Bottles o' Enchanting

![Crafting Recipe 2#](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4856c6a10a513da95b72d526aa9f472f5d014568.png)

Version 2.0.0 Recipes:

Brewing Recipe 1#:

![Version 2.0.0 Brewing Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94480b49903ee2cdf45b5b8a579b3fc06b50b8ba.png)

Brewing Recipe 2#:

![Brewing Recipe 2#](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d71c21328cb99c477ab8403ea445e6bdae375e79.png)

_**Note**_:

- The items in the recipe are the old textures
